scope.question: Upgrade D+Q bone registry-extracted records with retained ClinicalTrials.gov text-snapshot provenance.

inputs.summary: Coordinator prompt and codex_job specification for the bounded D+Q bone registry markdown provenance repair.
Repository plan plus text-ingestion, extraction, agent-output, and Codex CLI worker rules used to constrain the repair.
Schemas read for scoped canonical records, candidate change, and final agent-run output shape.
ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 source snapshot ID preserved on all repaired NCT04313634 registry provenance locators.
Retained public-registry text_snapshot providing raw payload, normalized markdown, section index, and artifact hashes for NCT04313634.
Normalized registry markdown and retained section index used to replace older ClinicalTrials.gov module locators with section-stable registry_record locators.
Source and study context for the existing D+Q postmenopausal bone RCT records; PubMed provenance was preserved unchanged.
Scoped finding record updated only for the NCT04313634 registry provenance locator.

inputs.reference: data/outcomes/dq-bone-ctx-20wk.json; data/outcomes/dq-bone-p1np-2wk.json; data/outcomes/dq-bone-p1np-4wk.json; data/outcomes/dq-bone-p1np-20wk.json; data/outcomes/dq-bone-bmd-20wk.json; data/outcomes/dq-bone-sasp-2wk.json; data/outcomes/dq-bone-adverse-events-20wk.json
inputs.summary: Scoped outcome records updated only for retained text_snapshot provenance and section-stable registry locators.
Scoped result records updated only for retained text_snapshot provenance and section-stable registry locators.

outputs.summary: Created the submitted provenance-repair candidate and updated 15 scoped D+Q bone finding, outcome, and result records. Each existing NCT04313634 registry locator now carries the retained ClinicalTrials.gov text_snapshot_id and a registry_record section locator; source IDs, source_snapshot IDs, result values, directions, confidence, statements, caveats, and interpretations were preserved.
